title: Be Proud
body: Be Proud adds several LGBTQIA+ flags with more on the way in upcoming updates. It also includes the **Pride Book**, describing the meaning of each and every flag added by the mod. Flags are crafted in the printer, which must contain the required dyes. To fill the printer right-click it with the dye in hand or, inside it's inventory, drag the dye onto the corresponding tank. ## Join our discord server
